name: Brown Sugar Prune Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups C & H Golden Brown Sugar (firmly packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in prunes.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and spices; add alternately with buttermilk to the creamed mixture. Stir in walnuts.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a rack.
8. Cut into 9 squares.
9. Serve with a dollop of sour cream or whipped cream.
10. Top with brown sugar.
